title: Cat-Append
preview: Interactive stdin capture and append to file.
name: catappend
description: Interactively append multi-line stdin content to a target file, with file selection fallback and append-only behavior. See #assets/payloads/FILEOPS/catappend.
outputs: Appends captured stdin to the chosen target file
Prints start, separator, and done messages

behavior.target_resolution: Uses $1 first, then fzf selection, then manual filename prompt
behavior.capture_mode: Reads stdin directly and appends it to the target file
behavior.safety: Never truncates or overwrites the target file
fallbacks: fzf selection when no filename is supplied
manual prompt when fzf returns nothing

notes: Requires an interactive terminal for the prompt flow
Best used when adding content to an existing file
